name: Scratch Lab Golf - Walnut Creek
address: 1637 Mt Diablo Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
about: Scratch Lab Golf - Walnut Creek offers a premium indoor golf simulator experience using Trackman technology for precise ball and club tracking. The venue features private, climate-controlled bays with access to 400+ virtual golf courses and advanced analytics on each shot. Pricing is based on half-hour sessions starting at $30, with membership options available for frequent visitors. It is best suited for golfers seeking serious practice, play, and professional coaching in a dedicated environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman technology provides real-time swing and ball tracking data
Access to 400+ virtual golf courses for varied play experiences
Professional PGA coaching available for personalized skill improvement
Comprehensive club fitting services for equipment optimization
Flexible booking with no membership required for casual use

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology combining radar, infrared and high-speed imaging

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, full sets of clubs are provided at each simulator for use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink service is mentioned; BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified, but sessions are available in half-hour increments.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers tailored lessons for players at all levels and ages, making it suitable for juniors and youth.
